creator: tege@nada.kth.se
text:
When I build a kernel with
  options               "MAXDSIZ=(256*1024*1024)"
  options               "DFLDSIZ=(64*1024*1024)"
instead of the default values, the Linux emulator fails for some
programs with a message claiming /compat/linux/lib/ld-linux.so.1 cannot
be loaded.

Fix: 

Downgrade to Linux with "emulates" Linux really well.  ;-)
How-To-Repeat: 
Here is a trigger case (the GIMPS mprime program).
Just run it with `mprime'.
